General.Name: CIFI Holdings Group Co Ltd
General.Description: CIFI Holdings (Group) Co. Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the property development and investment business in the People's Republic of China. It operates through three segments: Sales of Properties and Other Property Related Services; Property Investment; and Property Management and Other Services. The company develops and sells office and commercial premises, and residential properties; and leases investment properties. It also provides car parking, project management, business management, consultancy, and construction services. CIFI Holdings (Group) Co. Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Shanghai, the People's Republic of China.
